title: Trevor's Cryptids
description: Gathers the Cryptids of Trevor's Henderson together to haunt your overworld
body:
![chicken ghost, chickens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0951ba754b9593a989a2372c6d9d0164181ba27.jpeg)


## Trevor's Cryptids adds many new terryfing creatures based on canon i likely canon arts of Trevor's Henderson.

the mobs can be found spawning at night or by their special functions. They are designed to be as accurate as possible while not making them overpowered, while also staying vanilla friendly. Are you ready for the horrors?





Mobs List

![bonesworth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f0acd753d9b03dc5c7290552553de57186da6c3_0.webp)

**Bonesworth** a mysterious skeletal creature, has been summoned to minecraft, spawns as usuall mobs at night time, his head layer splits in two, he is a fast skeletal mob which drops bones upon death.

![chicken ghost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dead7b18267daea1562153c30efb0727d16b500.png)

**Chicken Ghost** the god of all chickens, will protect any chicken when the sunlights gone, whenever he senses a chicken dying at night, he will not hesitate to kill their killer.

![dark nugget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8537c01cc43a45a14fa9f2bf0e0eeb92c9678e48.png)

**??? Nugget** also known as the **Void** or **Dark Nugget**, is an unwanted evolution of the Lil' Nugget, a "Rare drop Lil Nugget" which can additionaly spawn when a killed Lil' Nugget duplicates, he is faster and stronger, and doesn't want mercy

![forgotten baby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e64c14acf48b239fa31258051365b9e7fd1844f7.png)

**Forgotten Baby** is a large disturbing humanoid, which makes ur nightmares while ur sleeping come true, he will try to appear while your trying to sleep, if he does he will make sure you know of his presence.

![lil' nuggets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/509a2354e9bf3488825e7da573a7e1d29da6929b.png)

**Lil' Nuggets**, an adorable docile little fleshy monster, they dont like loneliness, they will spawn in groups and scatter around at nightime. If you decide to kill them, they might duplicate, sometimes few of them might die right off, sometimes they might create an entire army. A Effective way to avoid them duplicating is using a **Lava Bucket**. Lil' Nuggets have a rare chance to grow into The Lamb

![the lamb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0fb9f431d528a86629a1743330cdbc2a82a2516.png)

**The Lamb**, what does it do? Psychic damage, the lamb is a evolution of the Lil' Nugget, the lamb will do melee damage aswell as Psychic damage, which affects the player with **Wither Effect**, aswell as a Lil' Nugget, upon death they can drop 2 to 4 lil nuggets, they have a higher chance to.



- A mod made by Crifish
- Currently contains 6 creatures
- Feel free to use in modpacks
- You can port my mods if permission given



Mods Origins

[Trevor Henderson Wiki | Fandom](https://trevorhenderson.fandom.com/wiki/Trevor_Henderson_Wiki)
